search.query: index=vmware-esxilog sourcetype=vmw-syslog tag=authentication | timechart count by action
index=vmware-esxilog sourcetype=vmw-syslog tag=authentication | eval action=coalesce(action,authentication_event) | fields _time host user src action signature | sort - _time | head 50
index=vmware-esxilog sourcetype=vmw-syslog vsan_used=* | eval used_tb=round(vsan_used/1024/1024/1024/1024,2) | timechart max(used_tb) by host limit=10

index=vmware-esxilog sourcetype=vmw-syslog (lat_us_new=* OR H=* OR queue_status=*) | eval issue=coalesce(device, "scsi_issue") | table _time host issue lat_us_old lat_us_new H D P queue_status | sort - _time
